query: Italian mushroom risotto with arborio rice, white wine, parmesan, and mixed mushrooms

draft.title: Mushroom Risotto
draft.description: Italian mushroom risotto with arborio rice, white wine, parmesan, and mixed mushrooms, perfect for a creamy, savory meal.

ingredients.name: mixed mushroom
ingredients.note: such as cremini, shiitake, and button mushrooms, sliced

steps.text: Heat olive oil and half the butter in a large pan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until softened and lightly browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes until the rice is well coated and slightly toasted.
Pour in the white wine and stir continuously until it is mostly absorbed by the rice.
Add warm vegetable stock one ladle at a time, stirring frequently and allowing the liquid to be absorbed before adding more. Continue until the rice is creamy and al dente, about 18-20 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the remaining butter and grated parmesan cheese. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
